use.flag: - ASLR - Little runtime penalty so fast during testing in your own projects. - Sample based guard pages not comprehensive heap mitigation. - It is primarily to test if your project or others are affected by a heap overflow vulnerability.
- ASLR - Guard pages for metadata only - UAF mitigation - Heap corruption mitigation
- ASLR - Every page guarded - Guard pages for metadata also - UAF mitigation - Heap corruption mitigation
